items.title: DHL moves early to renew Cargojet contract until 2033
items.description: DHL has extended its long-term dedicated transport contract with Cargojet with two years left on the existing contract. The post DHL moves early to renew Cargojet contract until 2033 appeared first on FreightWaves.

items.title: Amazon Stock: What Investors Need To Know
items.description: Amazon stock is among the world's most valuable, driven by its massive e-commerce and cloud businesses. But is it a buy?

items.title: Federal regulators give Zoox an exemption for its custom-built robotaxis
items.description: NHTSA is also closing an investigation into the Amazon-owned autonomous vehicle company.

items.title: B.C. Labour Board slams Amazon in appeal ruling
items.description: Amazon has failed to overturn the B.C. Labour Relations Board's ruling and the company suffered a scathing indictment from the Board about its conduct during the Unifor unionization drive at the Delta B.C. facility ("YVR2").
